{
  "contents": "/**\n * 历史记录保存器\n * 负责将 Markdown 内容保存到文件系统\n */\n\nimport * as fs from 'fs/promises';\nimport * as path from 'path';\nimport { ComposerData } from './types';\nimport { trackEventIfLoggedIn, TelemetryEvents } from './telemetry/telemetry';\n\nexport class HistorySaver {\n    private historyDir: string;\n    private source: string;\n    \n    constructor(workspaceRoot: string, outputDir: string = '.llm-chat-history/history', source: string = 'unknown') {\n        this.historyDir = path.join(workspaceRoot, outputDir);\n        this.source = source;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 保存对话到文件\n     */\n    async save(composer: ComposerData, markdown: string): Promise<string> {\n        // 确保目录存在\n        await fs.mkdir(this.historyDir, { recursive: true });\n\n        // 生成文件名\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(composer);\n        const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\n\n        // 检查是否需要更新\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\n\n        if (shouldSave) {\n            await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\n            console.log(`[HistorySaver] ✓ Saved: ${filepath}`);\n            \n            // 上报文件保存事件（仅登录用户）\n            trackEventIfLoggedIn(TelemetryEvents.FILE_SAVED_LOCALLY, {\n                source: this.source,\n                session_id: composer.composerId,\n            });\n        } else {\n            console.log(`[HistorySaver] ⊘ Skipped (unchanged): ${filepath}`);\n        }\n\n        return filepath;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 生成文件名\n     */\n    private generateFilename(composer: ComposerData): string {\n        const date = new Date(composer.createdAt);\n        const year = date.getUTCFullYear();\n        const month = String(date.getUTCMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');\n        const day = String(date.getUTCDate()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const hour = String(date.getUTCHours()).padStart(2, '0');\n        const minute = String(date.getUTCMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');\n        \n        const timestamp = `${year}-${month}-${day}_${hour}-${minute}Z`;\n        const title = this.sanitizeTitle(composer.name || 'untitled');\n        \n        return `${timestamp}-${title}.md`;\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 清理标题中的特殊字符\n     */\n    private sanitizeTitle(title: string): string {\n        // 移除特殊字符\n        return title\n            .replace(/[<>:\"/\\\\|?*]/g, '-')\n            .replace(/\\s+/g, '-')\n            .toLowerCase()\n            .substring(0, 50);\n    }\n    \n    /**\n     * 检查是否需要保存\n     */\n    private async shouldSave(filepath: string, newContent: string): Promise<boolean> {\n        try {\n            const existingContent = await fs.readFile(filepath, 'utf-8');\n            return existingContent !== newContent;\n        } catch {\n            // 文件不存在，需要保存\n            return true;\n        }\n    }\n}\n\n\n",

}

{
  "contents": "/**\n * 数据库监听器\n * 监听 Cursor 数据库变化并自动同步\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './cursor-database-reader';\nimport { ConversationBuilder } from './cursor-conversation-builder';\nimport { MarkdownGenerator } from './cursor-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { WorkspaceFilter } from './cursor-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { SqliteLoader } from '../../sqlite-loader';\nimport { CloudSyncManager, SyncSession } from '../../cloud/cloud-sync';\nimport { Message } from '../../types';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\n\n// 缓存的会话数据，用于云端同步\ninterface CachedSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    workspace_path?: string;\n    workspace_name?: string;\n    messages: Message[];\n}\n\nexport class DatabaseWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private dbPath: string;\n    private lastLocalSync: number = 0;\n    private lastCloudSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private cloudSyncTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: WorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n    private extensionPath: string;\n    \n    // 缓存会话数据，供云端同步使用\n    private cachedSessions: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n    constructor(dbPath: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting, extensionPath?: string) {\n        this.dbPath = dbPath;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new WorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n        this.extensionPath = extensionPath || '';\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 启动监听\n     */\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        // 1. 立即执行一次本地同步\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        // 3. 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000); // 30 秒\n\n        // 4. 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 60000); // 60 秒\n\n        // 5. 启动时延迟 5 秒执行一次云端同步（给本地同步时间收集数据）\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 5000);\n\n        console.log('Database watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）- 仅本地保存\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行本地同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\n        if (now - this.lastLocalSync < 1000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastLocalSync = now;\n\n        this.performLocalSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Local sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行云端同步\n     */\n    cloudSyncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的云端同步\n        if (now - this.lastCloudSync < 5000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastCloudSync = now;\n\n        this.performCloudSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Cloud sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行本地同步 - 保存到本地 Markdown 文件\n     */\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        let reader: CursorDatabaseReader;\n\n        try {\n            // 首先尝试创建数据库读取器\n            reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n        } catch (error) {\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n\n            // 检查是否是 SQLite3 兼容性问题\n            if (errorMessage.includes('NODE_MODULE_VERSION') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('SQLITE_COMPATIBILITY_ERROR') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('compiled against a different Node.js version')) {\n\n                console.log('Detected SQLite3 compatibility issue, attempting to fix...');\n\n                // 尝试重新加载 SQLite3\n                const sqliteLoader = new SqliteLoader(this.extensionPath);\n                const sqliteReady = await sqliteLoader.ensureLoaded();\n\n                if (!sqliteReady) {\n                    throw new Error('Failed to load compatible SQLite3 binary. Please check the extension logs for more details.');\n                }\n\n                // 重新尝试创建数据库读取器\n                reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n            } else {\n                throw error;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            // 获取所有 composer\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\n\n            console.log(`Found ${composers.length} composers`);\n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] Current workspace: ${this.workspaceRoot}`);\n\n            let skippedCount = 0;\n            for (const composer of composers) {\n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\n                    composer,\n                    reader\n                );\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    skippedCount++;\n                    continue;\n                }\n                console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] ✓ Matched composer: ${composer.name || composer.composerId}`);\n\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\n\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\n\n                // 获取 bubbles\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) continue;\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\n\n                // 保存到本地\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cursor');\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: composer.name || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: composer.composerId,\n                    workspace_path: this.workspaceRoot,\n                    workspace_name: this.workspaceRoot.split(/[/\\\\]/).pop() || 'Unknown',\n                    messages: messages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n            \n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] Skipped ${skippedCount} composers (not in current workspace)`);\n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] Matched ${sessionsToCache.length} composers for saving`);\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n            if (automationProvider && composers.length > 0) {\n                const now = new Date();\n                const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, composers.length);\n            }\n        } finally {\n            reader.close();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[CloudSync] No sessions to sync');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'cursor',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                workspace_path: session.workspace_path,\n                workspace_name: session.workspace_name,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('cursor', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[CloudSync] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'cursor');\n        }\n    }\n}\n",

{
  "contents": "/**\n * 数据库读取器\n * 负责从 Cursor SQLite 数据库读取对话数据\n */\n\nimport Database from 'better-sqlite3';\nimport { ComposerData, Bubble, DatabaseRow } from '../../types';\n\nexport class CursorDatabaseReader {\n    private db: Database.Database;\n\n    constructor(dbPath: string) {\n        // 只读模式 + WAL 模式\n        this.db = new Database(dbPath, {\n            readonly: true,\n            fileMustExist: true\n        });\n\n        // 设置 WAL 模式\n        this.db.pragma('journal_mode = WAL');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取所有 Composer\n     */\n    getAllComposers(): ComposerData[] {\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\n            SELECT key, value\n            FROM cursorDiskKV\n            WHERE key LIKE 'composerData:%'\n        `);\n\n        const rows = stmt.all() as DatabaseRow[];\n        const composers: ComposerData[] = [];\n\n        for (const row of rows) {\n            try {\n                // 值可能是 Buffer 或字符串\n                const valueStr = typeof row.value === 'string'\n                    ? row.value\n                    : row.value.toString('utf-8');\n                const data = JSON.parse(valueStr) as ComposerData;\n                composers.push(data);\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('Failed to parse composer:', error);\n            }\n        }\n\n        return composers;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取指定 Composer 的所有 Bubble\n     */\n    getComposerBubbles(composerId: string, bubbleIds: string[]): Bubble[] {\n        const bubbles: Bubble[] = [];\n\n        for (const bubbleId of bubbleIds) {\n            const key = `bubbleId:${composerId}:${bubbleId}`;\n            const stmt = this.db.prepare('SELECT value FROM cursorDiskKV WHERE key = ?');\n            const row = stmt.get(key) as DatabaseRow | undefined;\n\n            if (row && row.value) {\n                try {\n                    // 值可能是 Buffer 或字符串\n                    const valueStr = typeof row.value === 'string'\n                        ? row.value\n                        : row.value.toString('utf-8');\n                    const bubble = JSON.parse(valueStr) as Bubble;\n                    bubbles.push(bubble);\n                } catch (error) {\n                    console.error(`Failed to parse bubble ${bubbleId}:`, error);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        return bubbles;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 关闭数据库连接\n     */\n    close(): void {\n        this.db.close();\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 带重试的数据库打开函数\n */\nexport async function openDatabase(dbPath: string, maxRetries = 3): Promise<CursorDatabaseReader> {\n    for (let i = 0; i < maxRetries; i++) {\n        try {\n            return new CursorDatabaseReader(dbPath);\n        } catch (error) {\n            // 检查是否是 SQLite3 兼容性问题\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            if (errorMessage.includes('NODE_MODULE_VERSION') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('better_sqlite3.node') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('compiled against a different Node.js version')) {\n\n                // 如果是第一次遇到这个问题，尝试重新加载 SQLite3\n                if (i === 0) {\n                    console.log('Detected SQLite3 compatibility issue, attempting to reload...');\n                    // 这里我们不直接处理，让调用方处理\n                    throw new Error('SQLITE_COMPATIBILITY_ERROR: ' + errorMessage);\n                }\n            }\n\n            if (i < maxRetries - 1) {\n                // 等待 500ms 后重试\n                await sleep(500);\n                continue;\n            }\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n    throw new Error('Failed to open database after retries');\n}\n\nfunction sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {\n    return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));\n}\n",
  "numCharactersInRequestedRange": 3653,
  "totalLinesInFile": 124
}

(!vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders || vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders.length === 0) {\n        console.warn('No workspace folder open');\n        return;\n    }\n    \n    // 工作区路径（使用第一个工作区）\n    const workspaceRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;\n    if (!workspaceRoot) {\n        console.warn('No workspace folder path resolved');\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // 存储启动的监听器\n    const watchers: Array<{ stop: () => void; syncNow: () => void }> = [];\n    \n    // 尝试启动 Cursor 监听\n    const cursorDbPath = getCursorDatabasePath();\n    if (fs.existsSync(cursorDbPath)) {\n        console.log('Cursor database found, starting Cursor watcher');\n        const cursorWatcher = new DatabaseWatcher(cursorDbPath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting, context.extensionPath);\n        cursorWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(cursorWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('Cursor database not found:', cursorDbPath);\n    }\n    \n    // 尝试启动 Cline 监听\n    const clineStoragePath = getClineStoragePath();\n    if (fs.existsSync(clineStoragePath)) {\n        console.log('[Cline] Storage found, starting watcher');\n        const clineWatcher = new ClineWatcher(clineStoragePath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        clineWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(clineWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('[Cline] Storage not found');\n    }\n\n    // 尝试启动 Blackbox AI 监听\n    const blackboxStoragePath = getBlackboxStoragePath();\n    if (fs.existsSync(blackboxStoragePath)) {\n        console.log('Blackbox AI storage found, starting Blackbox AI watcher');\n        const blackboxWatcher = new BlackboxWatcher(blackboxStoragePath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        blackboxWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(blackboxWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('Blackbox AI storage not found:', blackboxStoragePath);\n    }\n\n    // 尝试启动 Kilo 监听\n    const kiloStoragePath = getKiloStoragePath();\n    if (fs.existsSync(kiloStoragePath)) {\n        console.log('Kilo storage found, starting Kilo watcher');\n        const kiloWatcher = new KiloWatcher(kiloStoragePath, workspaceRoot, localeSetting);\n        kiloWatcher.start();\n        watchers.push(kiloWatcher);\n    } else {\n        console.log('Kilo storage not found:', kiloStoragePath);\n    }\n    \n    // 如果没有找到任何聊天历史\n    if (watchers.length === 0) {\n        console.warn('No chat history sources found (Cursor, Cline, Blackbox AI, or Kilo)');\n        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n            'LLM Chat History: No supported AI plugins found. Please install and use Cursor, Cline, Blackbox AI, or Kilo.'\n        );\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // 上报插件激活事件\n    telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_ACTIVATED, {\n        watchers_count: watchers.length,\n        cursor_found: fs.existsSync(cursorDbPath),\n        cline_found: fs.existsSync(clineStoragePath),\n        blackbox_found: fs.existsSync(blackboxStoragePath),\n        kilo_found: fs.existsSync(kiloStoragePath),\n        cloud_sync_enabled: config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false),\n        auto_save_enabled: autoSave,\n    });\n    \n    // 注册命令：手动保存\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\n        () => {\n            console.log('[SaveNow] ========== Manual save triggered ==========');\n            console.log(`[SaveNow] Number of watchers: ${watchers.length}`);\n            console.log(`[SaveNow] Workspace root: ${workspaceRoot}`);\n            \n            // 上报手动保存事件\n            telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.MANUAL_SAVE_TRIGGERED);\n            \n            if (watchers.length === 0) {\n                console.error('[SaveNow] ERROR: No watchers available!');\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage('No chat history sources found. Check Developer Console for details.');\n                return;\n            }\n            \n            for (let i = 0; i < watchers.length; i++) {\n                console.log(`[SaveNow] Triggering syncNow for watcher ${i + 1}/${watchers.length}`);\n                watchers[i].syncNow();\n            }\n            console.log('[SaveNow] ========== Manual save completed ==========');\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('info.saved'));\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：搜索聊天历史\n    const searchCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.search',\n        () => {\n            showSearchInterface(context);\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 初始化云端同步管理器\n    const cloudSync = new CloudSyncManager(context, localeSetting);\n\n    // 初始化侧边栏视图\n    const automationStatusProvider = new AutomationStatusProvider(cloudSync, t);\n    const accountStatusProvider = new AccountStatusProvider(cloudSync, t);\n\n    // 注册树视图\n    const automationTreeView = vscode.window.createTreeView('chatHistoryStatus', {\n        treeDataProvider: automationStatusProvider,\n        showCollapseAll: false\n    });\n\n    const accountTreeView = vscode.window.createTreeView('chatHistoryAccount', {\n        treeDataProvider: accountStatusProvider,\n        showCollapseAll: false\n    });\n\n    context.subscriptions.push(automationTreeView, accountTreeView);\n\n    // 导出到全局供其他模块使用\n    (global as any).__automationStatusProvider = automationStatusProvider;\n    (global as any).__accountStatusProvider = accountStatusProvider;\n\n    // 注册命令：云端登录\n    const cloudLoginCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudLogin',\n        async () => {\n            if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                // 已登录，显示选项\n                vscode.window.showQuickPick([\n                    { label: t('cloud.logout'), action: 'logout' },\n                    { label: 'Sync Now', action: 'sync' }\n                ], {\n                    placeHolder: t('cloud.loggedInAs', { username: cloudSync.getUser()?.username || '' })\n                }).then(async (selected) => {\n                    if (selected?.action === 'logout') {\n                        await cloudSync.logout();\n                    } else if (selected?.action === 'sync') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudSync');\n                    }\n                });\n            } else {\n                // 未登录，显示选择登录或注册\n                const choice = await vscode.window.showQuickPick([\n                    { label: '$(sign-in) Login', description: 'Login to your existing account', action: 'login' },\n                    { label: '$(person-add) Register', description: 'Create a new account', action: 'register' }\n                ], {\n                    placeHolder: 'Login or register to enable cloud sync'\n                });\n\n                if (choice) {\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser(choice.action as 'login' | 'register');\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：云端登出\n    const cloudLogoutCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudLogout',\n        async () => {\n            if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                await cloudSync.logout();\n                // 刷新侧边栏\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n                accountStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：查看云同步状态\n    const showCloudStatusCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.showCloudStatus',\n        async () => {\n            const statusInfo = cloudSync.getStatusInfo();\n            \n            const actions: string[] = [];\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                actions.push('Login', 'Enable Cloud Sync');\n            } else if (!cloudSync.isEnabled()) {\n                actions.push('Enable Cloud Sync', 'Logout');\n            } else {\n                actions.push('Sync Now', 'Check Connection', 'Logout');\n            }\n\n            const choice = await vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n                `${statusInfo.status}\\n\\n${statusInfo.message}\\n\\n${statusInfo.details}`,\n                ...actions\n            );\n\n            if (choice === 'Login') {\n                await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n            } else if (choice === 'Enable Cloud Sync') {\n                await vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory').update('cloudSync.enabled', true, true);\n            } else if (choice === 'Sync Now') {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudSync');\n            } else if (choice === 'Check Connection') {\n                await cloudSync.validateToken(true);\n            } else if (choice === 'Logout') {\n                await cloudSync.logout();\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：刷新侧边栏状态\n    const refreshStatusCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.refreshStatus',\n        () => {\n            automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            accountStatusProvider.refresh();\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage('Status refreshed');\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：打开设置\n    const openSettingsCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.openSettings',\n        (settingKey?: string) => {\n            if (settingKey) {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.openSettings', settingKey);\n            } else {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.openSettings', 'chatHistory');\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：立即同步到云端\n    const cloudSyncCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudSync',\n        async () => {\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                const choice = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    t('cloud.notLoggedIn'),\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Cancel'\n                );\n                if (choice === 'Login Now') {\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                }\n                return;\n            }\n\n            if (!cloudSync.isEnabled()) {\n                const enable = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    'Cloud sync is not enabled. Enable it now?',\n                    'Enable',\n                    'Cancel'\n                );\n                if (enable === 'Enable') {\n                    await vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory').update('cloudSync.enabled', true, true);\n                } else {\n                    return;\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 上报手动同步事件\n            telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.MANUAL_SYNC_TRIGGERED);\n\n            vscode.window.withProgress(\n                {\n                    location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\n                    title: t('cloud.syncing'),\n                    cancellable: false,\n                },\n                async () => {\n                    try {\n                        // 触发所有 watcher 同步\n                        for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                            watcher.syncNow();\n                        }\n                        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('cloud.syncSuccess'));\n                    } catch (error) {\n                        const errorMsg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n                        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(t('cloud.syncFailed') + ': ' + errorMsg);\n                    }\n                }\n            );\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 导出 cloudSync 供 watcher 使用\n    (global as any).__cloudSyncManager = cloudSync;\n\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        saveCommand, \n        searchCommand, \n        cloudLoginCommand, \n        cloudLogoutCommand, \n        showCloudStatusCommand, \n        cloudSyncCommand,\n        refreshStatusCommand,\n        openSettingsCommand,\n        {\n            dispose: () => {\n                for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                    watcher.stop();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    );\n    \n    console.log(`LLM Chat History Extension ready (${watchers.length} source(s))`);\n\n    // 验证已存储的 token（启动时静默检查）\n    if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n        cloudSync.validateToken(false).then((valid) => {\n            if (!valid) {\n                console.log('Stored token is invalid, cleared');\n                // Token 失效，显示提示\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    // 定期检查 token 状态（每小时检查一次）\n    const tokenCheckInterval = setInterval(async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            const valid = await cloudSync.validateToken(false);\n            if (!valid) {\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }, 60 * 60 * 1000); // 每小时检查一次\n\n    context.subscriptions.push({ dispose: () => clearInterval(tokenCheckInterval) });\n\n    // 检查云同步状态的函数\n    const checkCloudSyncStatus = async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isEnabled() && !cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            // 立即打开登录界面\n            console.log('[CloudSync] Enabled but not logged in, opening login dialog...');\n            \n            // 显示模态提示，强制用户注意\n            const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n            const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n            const message = debugMode \n                ? '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled (Debug Mode). You must login to sync your chat history.'\n                : '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled. You must login to sync your chat history.';\n            \n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                message,\n                { modal: false }, // 不阻塞，但更醒目\n                'Login Now',\n                'Disable Cloud Sync'\n            ).then(async selection => {\n                if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                    // 使用浏览器OAuth流程\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                } else if (selection === 'Disable Cloud Sync') {\n                    config.update('cloudSync.enabled', false, true);\n                }\n            });\n            \n            // 同时自动触发浏览器登录\n            cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n        }\n    };\n\n    // 启动时检查\n    checkCloudSyncStatus();\n\n    // 监听配置变化\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        vscode.workspace.onDidChangeConfiguration(e => {\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled')) {\n                checkCloudSyncStatus();\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n                // 上报云同步启用/禁用事件\n                const newConfig = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const enabled = newConfig.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false);\n                telemetry.trackEvent(\n                    enabled ? TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_ENABLED : TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_DISABLED\n                );\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.autoSave')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n        })\n    );\n\n    // 导出 telemetry 供其他模块使用\n    (global as any).__telemetryManager = telemetry;\n}\n\n/**\n * 扩展停用时调用\n */\nexport async function deactivate() {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension deactivated');\n\n    // 上报插件停用事件并刷新队列\n    try {\n        const telemetry = (global as any).__telemetryManager as TelemetryManager | undefined;\n        if (telemetry) {\n            await telemetry.trackEventImmediately(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_DEACTIVATED);\n            await telemetry.dispose();\n        }\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('[Telemetry] Failed to send deactivation event:', error);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\n */\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    }\n}\n\n\n"

kiloStoragePath);\n    }\n    \n    // 如果没有找到任何聊天历史\n    if (watchers.length === 0) {\n        console.warn('No chat history sources found (Cursor, Cline, Blackbox AI, or Kilo)');\n        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n            'LLM Chat History: No supported AI plugins found. Please install and use Cursor, Cline, Blackbox AI, or Kilo.'\n        );\n        return;\n    }\n\n    // 上报插件激活事件\n    telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_ACTIVATED, {\n        watchers_count: watchers.length,\n        cursor_found: fs.existsSync(cursorDbPath),\n        cline_found: fs.existsSync(clineStoragePath),\n        blackbox_found: fs.existsSync(blackboxStoragePath),\n        kilo_found: fs.existsSync(kiloStoragePath),\n        cloud_sync_enabled: config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false),\n        auto_save_enabled: autoSave,\n    });\n    \n    // 注册命令：手动保存\n    const saveCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.saveNow',\n        () => {\n            console.log('[SaveNow] ========== Manual save triggered ==========');\n            console.log(`[SaveNow] Number of watchers: ${watchers.length}`);\n            console.log(`[SaveNow] Workspace root: ${workspaceRoot}`);\n            \n            // 上报手动保存事件\n            telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.MANUAL_SAVE_TRIGGERED);\n            \n            if (watchers.length === 0) {\n                console.error('[SaveNow] ERROR: No watchers available!');\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage('No chat history sources found. Check Developer Console for details.');\n                return;\n            }\n            \n            for (let i = 0; i < watchers.length; i++) {\n                console.log(`[SaveNow] Triggering syncNow for watcher ${i + 1}/${watchers.length}`);\n                watchers[i].syncNow();\n            }\n            console.log('[SaveNow] ========== Manual save completed ==========');\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('info.saved'));\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：搜索聊天历史\n    const searchCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.search',\n        () => {\n            showSearchInterface(context);\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 初始化云端同步管理器\n    const cloudSync = new CloudSyncManager(context, localeSetting);\n\n    // 初始化侧边栏视图\n    const automationStatusProvider = new AutomationStatusProvider(cloudSync, t);\n    const accountStatusProvider = new AccountStatusProvider(cloudSync, t);\n\n    // 注册树视图\n    const automationTreeView = vscode.window.createTreeView('chatHistoryStatus', {\n        treeDataProvider: automationStatusProvider,\n        showCollapseAll: false\n    });\n\n    const accountTreeView = vscode.window.createTreeView('chatHistoryAccount', {\n        treeDataProvider: accountStatusProvider,\n        showCollapseAll: false\n    });\n\n    context.subscriptions.push(automationTreeView, accountTreeView);\n\n    // 导出到全局供其他模块使用\n    (global as any).__automationStatusProvider = automationStatusProvider;\n    (global as any).__accountStatusProvider = accountStatusProvider;\n\n    // 注册命令：云端登录\n    const cloudLoginCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudLogin',\n        async () => {\n            if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                // 已登录，显示选项\n                vscode.window.showQuickPick([\n                    { label: t('cloud.logout'), action: 'logout' },\n                    { label: 'Sync Now', action: 'sync' }\n                ], {\n                    placeHolder: t('cloud.loggedInAs', { username: cloudSync.getUser()?.username || '' })\n                }).then(async (selected) => {\n                    if (selected?.action === 'logout') {\n                        await cloudSync.logout();\n                    } else if (selected?.action === 'sync') {\n                        vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudSync');\n                    }\n                });\n            } else {\n                // 未登录，显示选择登录或注册\n                const choice = await vscode.window.showQuickPick([\n                    { label: '$(sign-in) Login', description: 'Login to your existing account', action: 'login' },\n                    { label: '$(person-add) Register', description: 'Create a new account', action: 'register' }\n                ], {\n                    placeHolder: 'Login or register to enable cloud sync'\n                });\n\n                if (choice) {\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser(choice.action as 'login' | 'register');\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：云端登出\n    const cloudLogoutCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudLogout',\n        async () => {\n            if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                await cloudSync.logout();\n                // 刷新侧边栏\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n                accountStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：查看云同步状态\n    const showCloudStatusCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.showCloudStatus',\n        async () => {\n            const statusInfo = cloudSync.getStatusInfo();\n            \n            const actions: string[] = [];\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                actions.push('Login', 'Enable Cloud Sync');\n            } else if (!cloudSync.isEnabled()) {\n                actions.push('Enable Cloud Sync', 'Logout');\n            } else {\n                actions.push('Sync Now', 'Check Connection', 'Logout');\n            }\n\n            const choice = await vscode.window.showInformationMessage(\n                `${statusInfo.status}\\n\\n${statusInfo.message}\\n\\n${statusInfo.details}`,\n                ...actions\n            );\n\n            if (choice === 'Login') {\n                await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n            } else if (choice === 'Enable Cloud Sync') {\n                await vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory').update('cloudSync.enabled', true, true);\n            } else if (choice === 'Sync Now') {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('chatHistory.cloudSync');\n            } else if (choice === 'Check Connection') {\n                await cloudSync.validateToken(true);\n            } else if (choice === 'Logout') {\n                await cloudSync.logout();\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：刷新侧边栏状态\n    const refreshStatusCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.refreshStatus',\n        () => {\n            automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            accountStatusProvider.refresh();\n            vscode.window.showInformationMessage('Status refreshed');\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：打开设置\n    const openSettingsCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.openSettings',\n        (settingKey?: string) => {\n            if (settingKey) {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.openSettings', settingKey);\n            } else {\n                vscode.commands.executeCommand('workbench.action.openSettings', 'chatHistory');\n            }\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 注册命令：立即同步到云端\n    const cloudSyncCommand = vscode.commands.registerCommand(\n        'chatHistory.cloudSync',\n        async () => {\n            if (!cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n                const choice = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    t('cloud.notLoggedIn'),\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Cancel'\n                );\n                if (choice === 'Login Now') {\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                }\n                return;\n            }\n\n            if (!cloudSync.isEnabled()) {\n                const enable = await vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    'Cloud sync is not enabled. Enable it now?',\n                    'Enable',\n                    'Cancel'\n                );\n                if (enable === 'Enable') {\n                    await vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory').update('cloudSync.enabled', true, true);\n                } else {\n                    return;\n                }\n            }\n\n            // 上报手动同步事件\n            telemetry.trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.MANUAL_SYNC_TRIGGERED);\n\n            vscode.window.withProgress(\n                {\n                    location: vscode.ProgressLocation.Notification,\n                    title: t('cloud.syncing'),\n                    cancellable: false,\n                },\n                async () => {\n                    try {\n                        // 触发所有 watcher 同步\n                        for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                            watcher.syncNow();\n                        }\n                        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(t('cloud.syncSuccess'));\n                    } catch (error) {\n                        const errorMsg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n                        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(t('cloud.syncFailed') + ': ' + errorMsg);\n                    }\n                }\n            );\n        }\n    );\n\n    // 导出 cloudSync 供 watcher 使用\n    (global as any).__cloudSyncManager = cloudSync;\n\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        saveCommand, \n        searchCommand, \n        cloudLoginCommand, \n        cloudLogoutCommand, \n        showCloudStatusCommand, \n        cloudSyncCommand,\n        refreshStatusCommand,\n        openSettingsCommand,\n        {\n            dispose: () => {\n                for (const watcher of watchers) {\n                    watcher.stop();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    );\n    \n    console.log(`LLM Chat History Extension ready (${watchers.length} source(s))`);\n\n    // 验证已存储的 token（启动时静默检查）\n    if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n        cloudSync.validateToken(false).then((valid) => {\n            if (!valid) {\n                console.log('Stored token is invalid, cleared');\n                // Token 失效，显示提示\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        });\n    }\n\n    // 定期检查 token 状态（每小时检查一次）\n    const tokenCheckInterval = setInterval(async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            const valid = await cloudSync.validateToken(false);\n            if (!valid) {\n                vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                    '⚠️ Your cloud sync session has expired. Please login again.',\n                    'Login Now',\n                    'Later'\n                ).then(selection => {\n                    if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                        cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                    }\n                });\n            }\n        }\n    }, 60 * 60 * 1000); // 每小时检查一次\n\n    context.subscriptions.push({ dispose: () => clearInterval(tokenCheckInterval) });\n\n    // 检查云同步状态的函数\n    const checkCloudSyncStatus = async () => {\n        if (cloudSync.isEnabled() && !cloudSync.isLoggedIn()) {\n            // 立即打开登录界面\n            console.log('[CloudSync] Enabled but not logged in, opening login dialog...');\n            \n            // 显示模态提示，强制用户注意\n            const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n            const debugMode = config.get<boolean>('cloudSync.debugMode', false);\n            const message = debugMode \n                ? '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled (Debug Mode). You must login to sync your chat history.'\n                : '⚠️ Cloud sync enabled. You must login to sync your chat history.';\n            \n            vscode.window.showWarningMessage(\n                message,\n                { modal: false }, // 不阻塞，但更醒目\n                'Login Now',\n                'Disable Cloud Sync'\n            ).then(async selection => {\n                if (selection === 'Login Now') {\n                    // 使用浏览器OAuth流程\n                    await cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n                } else if (selection === 'Disable Cloud Sync') {\n                    config.update('cloudSync.enabled', false, true);\n                }\n            });\n            \n            // 同时自动触发浏览器登录\n            cloudSync.loginWithBrowser('login');\n        }\n    };\n\n    // 启动时检查\n    checkCloudSyncStatus();\n\n    // 监听配置变化\n    context.subscriptions.push(\n        vscode.workspace.onDidChangeConfiguration(e => {\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync.enabled')) {\n                checkCloudSyncStatus();\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n                // 上报云同步启用/禁用事件\n                const newConfig = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const enabled = newConfig.get<boolean>('cloudSync.enabled', false);\n                telemetry.trackEvent(\n                    enabled ? TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_ENABLED : TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_DISABLED\n                );\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.autoSave')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n            if (e.affectsConfiguration('chatHistory.cloudSync')) {\n                automationStatusProvider.refresh();\n            }\n        })\n    );\n\n    // 导出 telemetry 供其他模块使用\n    (global as any).__telemetryManager = telemetry;\n}\n\n/**\n * 扩展停用时调用\n */\nexport async function deactivate() {\n    console.log('LLM Chat History Extension deactivated');\n\n    // 上报插件停用事件并刷新队列\n    try {\n        const telemetry = (global as any).__telemetryManager as TelemetryManager | undefined;\n        if (telemetry) {\n            await telemetry.trackEventImmediately(TelemetryEvents.EXTENSION_DEACTIVATED);\n            await telemetry.dispose();\n        }\n    } catch (error) {\n        console.error('[Telemetry] Failed to send deactivation event:', error);\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 获取 Cursor 数据库路径\n */\nfunction getCursorDatabasePath(): string {\n    const platform = process.platform;\n    const homeDir = process.env.HOME || process.env.USERPROFILE || '';\n    \n    if (platform === 'win32') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'AppData/Roaming/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else if (platform === 'darwin') {\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            'Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    } else {\n        // Linux\n        return path.join(\n            homeDir,\n            '.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb'\n        );\n    }\n}\n\n\n"
}

   // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        // 1. 立即执行一次本地同步\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        // 3. 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000); // 30 秒\n\n        // 4. 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n console.log('Database watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）- 仅本地保存\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行本地同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        console.log('[Cursor:syncNow] ========== Starting sync ==========');\n sqliteLoader.ensureLoaded();\n\n                if (!sqliteReady) {\n                    throw new Error('Failed to load compatible SQLite3 binary. this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\n                    composer,\n                    reader\n                );\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    skippedCount++;\n                    continue;\n                }\n                console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] ✓ Matched composer: ${composer.name || composer.composerId}`);\n\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\n\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) continue;\n\n                // 获取 bubbles\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\n\n                // 保存到本地\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cursor');\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: composer.name || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: composer.composerId,\n                    workspace_path: this.workspaceRoot,\n                    workspace_name: this.workspaceRoot.split(/[/\\\\]/).pop() || 'Unknown',\n                    messages: messages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n            \n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] Skipped ${skippedCount} composers (not in current workspace)`);\n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] Matched ${sessionsToCache.length} composers for saving`);\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n            if (automationProvider && composers.length > 0) {\n                const now = new Date();\n                const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, composers.length);\n            }\n        } finally {\n            reader.close();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[CloudSync] No sessions to sync');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'cursor',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                workspace_path: session.workspace_path,\n                workspace_name: session.workspace_name,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('cursor', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[CloudSync] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'cursor');\n        }\n    }\n}\n"

   // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        // 1. 立即执行一次本地同步\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        // 3. 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000); // 30 秒\n\n        // 4. 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 60000); // 60 秒\n\n        // 5. 启动时延迟 5 秒执行一次云端同步（给本地同步时间收集数据）\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 5000);\n\n        console.log('Database watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() =>   "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * 数据库监听器\n * 监听 Cursor 数据库变化并自动同步\n */\n\nimport * as chokidar from 'chokidar';\nimport * as vscode from 'vscode';\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './cursor-database-reader';\nimport { ConversationBuilder } from './cursor-conversation-builder';\nimport { MarkdownGenerator } from './cursor-markdown-generator';\nimport { HistorySaver } from '../../history-saver';\nimport { WorkspaceFilter } from './cursor-workspace-filter';\nimport { createTranslator, LocaleSetting, Translator } from '../../i18n';\nimport { SqliteLoader } from '../../sqlite-loader';\nimport { CloudSyncManager, SyncSession } from '../../cloud/cloud-sync';\nimport { Message } from '../../types';\nimport { trackEvent, trackError, TelemetryEvents } from '../../telemetry/telemetry';\n\n// 缓存的会话数据，用于云端同步\ninterface CachedSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    workspace_path?: string;\n    workspace_name?: string;\n    messages: Message[];\n}\n\nexport class DatabaseWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private dbPath: string;\n    private lastLocalSync: number = 0;\n    private lastCloudSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private cloudSyncTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: WorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n    private extensionPath: string;\n    \n    // 缓存会话数据，供云端同步使用\n    private cachedSessions: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n    constructor(dbPath: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting, extensionPath?: string) {\n        this.dbPath = dbPath;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new WorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n        this.extensionPath = extensionPath || '';\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 启动监听\n     */\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        // 1. 立即执行一次本地同步\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        // 3. 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000); // 30 秒\n\n        // 4. 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 60000); // 60 秒\n\n        // 5. 启动时延迟 5 秒执行一次云端同步（给本地同步时间收集数据）\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 5000);\n\n        console.log('Database watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）- 仅本地保存\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行本地同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        console.log('[Cursor:syncNow] ========== Starting sync ==========');\n        console.log(`[Cursor:syncNow] Database path: ${this.dbPath}`);\n        console.log(`[Cursor:syncNow] Workspace root: ${this.workspaceRoot}`);\n        \n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\n        if (now - this.lastLocalSync < 1000) {\n            console.log('[Cursor:syncNow] Skipped: Too frequent (< 1s since last sync)');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastLocalSync = now;\n\n        this.performLocalSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[Cursor:syncNow] Local sync failed:', error);\n            console.error('[Cursor:syncNow] Error stack:', error instanceof Error ? error.stack : 'N/A');\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行云端同步\n     */\n    cloudSyncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的云端同步\n        if (now - this.lastCloudSync < 5000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastCloudSync = now;\n\n        this.performCloudSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Cloud sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行本地同步 - 保存到本地 Markdown 文件\n     */\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] ========== Starting local sync ==========');\n        let reader: CursorDatabaseReader;\n\n        try {\n            // 首先尝试创建数据库读取器\n            console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Creating database reader...');\n            reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n            console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Database reader created successfully');\n        } catch (error) {\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            console.error('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Failed to create database reader:', errorMessage);\n\n            // 检查是否是 SQLite3 兼容性问题\n            if (errorMessage.includes('NODE_MODULE_VERSION') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('SQLITE_COMPATIBILITY_ERROR') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('compiled against a different Node.js version')) {\n\n                console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Detected SQLite3 compatibility issue, attempting to fix...');\n\n                // 尝试重新加载 SQLite3\n                const sqliteLoader = new SqliteLoader(this.extensionPath);\n                const sqliteReady = await sqliteLoader.ensureLoaded();\n\n                if (!sqliteReady) {\n                    console.error('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Failed to load compatible SQLite3 binary');\n                    throw new Error('Failed to load compatible SQLite3 binary. Please check the extension logs for more details.');\n                }\n\n                // 重新尝试创建数据库读取器\n                console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Retrying database reader creation...');\n                reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n            } else {\n                throw error;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            // 获取所有 composer\n            console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Fetching all composers from database...');\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\n\n            console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Found ${composers.length} composers`);\n            console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Current workspace: ${this.workspaceRoot}`);\n\n            if (composers.length === 0) {\n                console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] No composers found in database. Check if Cursor has chat history.');\n            }\n\n            let skippedCount = 0;\n            let processedCount = 0;\n            for (const composer of composers) {\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Processing composer: ${composer.name || composer.composerId}`);\n                \n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\n                    composer,\n                    reader\n                );\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Skipped (not in workspace): ${composer.name || composer.composerId}`);\n                    skippedCount++;\n                    continue;\n                }\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] ✓ Matched composer: ${composer.name || composer.composerId}`);\n\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\n\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Bubble IDs count: ${bubbleIds.length}`);\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) {\n                    console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Skipped: No bubble IDs');\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 获取 bubbles\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Bubbles retrieved: ${bubbles.length}`);\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Messages built: ${messages.length}`);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Skipped: No messages');\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Markdown generated: ${markdown.length} chars`);\n\n                // 保存到本地\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Output directory: ${outputDir}`);\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cursor');\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Saving to: ${this.workspaceRoot}/${outputDir}`);\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\n                processedCount++;\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: composer.name || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: composer.composerId,\n                    workspace_path: this.workspaceRoot,\n                    workspace_name: this.workspaceRoot.split(/[/\\\\]/).pop() || 'Unknown',\n                    messages: messages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n            \n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] Skipped ${skippedCount} composers (not in current workspace)`);\n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] Matched ${sessionsToCache.length} composers for saving`);\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n            if (automationProvider && composers.length > 0) {\n                const now = new Date();\n                const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, composers.length);\n            }\n        } finally {\n            reader.close();\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[CloudSync] No sessions to sync');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'cursor',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                workspace_path: session.workspace_path,\n                workspace_name: session.workspace_name,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('cursor', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[CloudSync] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'cursor');\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
