'../../telemetry/telemetry';\n\n// 缓存的会话数据，用于云端同步\ninterface CachedSession {\n    title: string;\n    session_id: string;\n    workspace_path?: string;\n    workspace_name?: string;\n    messages: Message[];\n}\n\nexport class DatabaseWatcher {\n    private watcher: chokidar.FSWatcher | null = null;\n    private dbPath: string;\n    private lastLocalSync: number = 0;\n    private lastCloudSync: number = 0;\n    private debounceTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private cloudSyncTimer: NodeJS.Timeout | null = null;\n    private workspaceRoot: string;\n    private workspaceFilter: WorkspaceFilter;\n    private t: Translator;\n    private extensionPath: string;\n    \n    // 缓存会话数据，供云端同步使用\n    private cachedSessions: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n    constructor(dbPath: string, workspaceRoot: string, localeSetting?: LocaleSetting, extensionPath?: string) {\n        this.dbPath = dbPath;\n        this.workspaceRoot = workspaceRoot;\n        this.workspaceFilter = new WorkspaceFilter(workspaceRoot);\n        this.t = createTranslator(localeSetting);\n        this.extensionPath = extensionPath || '';\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 启动监听\n     */\n    start(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 启动事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STARTED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        // 1. 立即执行一次本地同步\n        this.syncNow();\n\n        // 2. 监听数据库文件变化\n        this.watcher = chokidar.watch(this.dbPath, {\n            persistent: true,\n            ignoreInitial: true\n        });\n\n        this.watcher.on('change', () => {\n            this.scheduleSync();\n        });\n\n        // 3. 定时轮询本地保存（每 30 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 30000); // 30 秒\n\n        // 4. 定时云端同步（每 60 秒）\n        setInterval(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 60000); // 60 秒\n\n        // 5. 启动时延迟 5 秒执行一次云端同步（给本地同步时间收集数据）\n        setTimeout(() => {\n            this.cloudSyncNow();\n        }, 5000);\n\n        console.log('Database watcher started (local: 30s, cloud: 60s)');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 停止监听\n     */\n    stop(): void {\n        // 上报 watcher 停止事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.WATCHER_STOPPED, { source: 'cursor' });\n\n        if (this.watcher) {\n            this.watcher.close();\n        }\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n        if (this.cloudSyncTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.cloudSyncTimer);\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 调度同步（防抖）- 仅本地保存\n     */\n    private scheduleSync(): void {\n        // 防抖：2 秒内只执行一次\n        if (this.debounceTimer) {\n            clearTimeout(this.debounceTimer);\n        }\n\n        this.debounceTimer = setTimeout(() => {\n            this.syncNow();\n        }, 2000);\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行本地同步\n     */\n    syncNow(): void {\n        console.log('[Cursor:syncNow] ========== Starting sync ==========');\n        console.log(`[Cursor:syncNow] Database path: ${this.dbPath}`);\n        console.log(`[Cursor:syncNow] Workspace root: ${this.workspaceRoot}`);\n        \n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的同步\n        if (now - this.lastLocalSync < 1000) {\n            console.log('[Cursor:syncNow] Skipped: Too frequent (< 1s since last sync)');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastLocalSync = now;\n\n        this.performLocalSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('[Cursor:syncNow] Local sync failed:', error);\n            console.error('[Cursor:syncNow] Error stack:', error instanceof Error ? error.stack : 'N/A');\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 立即执行云端同步\n     */\n    cloudSyncNow(): void {\n        const now = Date.now();\n\n        // 避免过于频繁的云端同步\n        if (now - this.lastCloudSync < 5000) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        this.lastCloudSync = now;\n\n        this.performCloudSync().catch(error => {\n            console.error('Cloud sync failed:', error);\n        });\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行本地同步 - 保存到本地 Markdown 文件\n     */\n    private async performLocalSync(): Promise<void> {\n        console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] ========== Starting local sync ==========');\n        let reader: CursorDatabaseReader;\n\n        try {\n            // 首先尝试创建数据库读取器\n            console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Creating database reader...');\n            reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n            console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Database reader created successfully');\n        } catch (error) {\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            console.error('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Failed to create database reader:', errorMessage);\n\n            // 检查是否是 SQLite3 兼容性问题\n            if (errorMessage.includes('NODE_MODULE_VERSION') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('SQLITE_COMPATIBILITY_ERROR') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('compiled against a different Node.js version')) {\n\n                console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Detected SQLite3 compatibility issue, attempting to fix...');\n\n                // 尝试重新加载 SQLite3\n                const sqliteLoader = new SqliteLoader(this.extensionPath);\n                const sqliteReady = await sqliteLoader.ensureLoaded();\n\n                if (!sqliteReady) {\n                    console.error('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Failed to load compatible SQLite3 binary');\n                    throw new Error('Failed to load compatible SQLite3 binary. Please check the extension logs for more details.');\n                }\n\n                // 重新尝试创建数据库读取器\n                console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Retrying database reader creation...');\n                reader = new CursorDatabaseReader(this.dbPath);\n            } else {\n                throw error;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // 收集会话数据用于后续云端同步\n        const sessionsToCache: CachedSession[] = [];\n\n        try {\n            // 获取所有 composer\n            console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Fetching all composers from database...');\n            const composers = reader.getAllComposers();\n\n            console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Found ${composers.length} composers`);\n            console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Current workspace: ${this.workspaceRoot}`);\n\n            if (composers.length === 0) {\n                console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] No composers found in database. Check if Cursor has chat history.');\n            }\n\n            let skippedCount = 0;\n            let processedCount = 0;\n            for (const composer of composers) {\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Processing composer: ${composer.name || composer.composerId}`);\n                \n                // 只处理属于当前工作区的对话\n                const belongsToWorkspace = this.workspaceFilter.belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\n                    composer,\n                    reader\n                );\n                if (!belongsToWorkspace) {\n                    console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Skipped (not in workspace): ${composer.name || composer.composerId}`);\n                    skippedCount++;\n                    continue;\n                }\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] ✓ Matched composer: ${composer.name || composer.composerId}`);\n\n                // 获取 bubble IDs\n                const bubbleIds = (composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [])\n                    .map(h => h.bubbleId);\n\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Bubble IDs count: ${bubbleIds.length}`);\n                if (bubbleIds.length === 0) {\n                    console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Skipped: No bubble IDs');\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 获取 bubbles\n                const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, bubbleIds);\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Bubbles retrieved: ${bubbles.length}`);\n\n                // 构建对话\n                const builder = new ConversationBuilder(this.t);\n                const messages = builder.buildConversation(composer, bubbles);\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Messages built: ${messages.length}`);\n\n                if (messages.length === 0) {\n                    console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Skipped: No messages');\n                    continue;\n                }\n\n                // 生成 Markdown\n                const generator = new MarkdownGenerator(this.t);\n                const markdown = generator.generate(composer, messages);\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Markdown generated: ${markdown.length} chars`);\n\n                // 保存到本地\n                const config = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('chatHistory');\n                const outputDir = config.get<string>('outputDirectory', '.llm-chat-history');\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Output directory: ${outputDir}`);\n\n                const saver = new HistorySaver(this.workspaceRoot, outputDir, 'cursor');\n                console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Saving to: ${this.workspaceRoot}/${outputDir}`);\n                await saver.save(composer, markdown);\n                processedCount++;\n\n                // 缓存会话数据供云端同步使用\n                sessionsToCache.push({\n                    title: composer.name || 'Untitled',\n                    session_id: composer.composerId,\n                    workspace_path: this.workspaceRoot,\n                    workspace_name: this.workspaceRoot.split(/[/\\\\]/).pop() || 'Unknown',\n                    messages: messages,\n                });\n            }\n\n            // 更新缓存\n            this.cachedSessions = sessionsToCache;\n            \n            console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] ========== Summary ==========');\n            console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Total composers: ${composers.length}`);\n            console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Skipped (not in workspace): ${skippedCount}`);\n            console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Processed and saved: ${processedCount}`);\n            console.log(`[Cursor:performLocalSync] Cached for cloud: ${sessionsToCache.length}`);\n\n            // 更新侧边栏统计信息\n            const automationProvider = (global as any).__automationStatusProvider;\n            if (automationProvider && composers.length > 0) {\n                const now = new Date();\n                const timeStr = now.toLocaleString();\n                automationProvider.updateStats(timeStr, composers.length);\n            }\n            \n            console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] ========== Local sync completed ==========');\n        } finally {\n            reader.close();\n            console.log('[Cursor:performLocalSync] Database connection closed');\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 执行云端同步 - 将缓存的会话数据同步到云端\n     */\n    private async performCloudSync(): Promise<void> {\n        const cloudSync = (global as any).__cloudSyncManager as CloudSyncManager | undefined;\n        const shouldCloudSync = cloudSync?.isLoggedIn() && cloudSync?.isEnabled() && cloudSync?.isAutoSyncEnabled();\n\n        if (!shouldCloudSync || !cloudSync) {\n            return;\n        }\n\n        if (this.cachedSessions.length === 0) {\n            console.log('[CloudSync] No sessions to sync');\n            return;\n        }\n\n        // 上报云同步开始事件\n        trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_STARTED, {\n            source: 'cursor',\n            sessions_count: this.cachedSessions.length,\n        });\n\n        try {\n            // 转换缓存的会话为云端同步格式\n            const cloudSessions: SyncSession[] = this.cachedSessions.map(session => ({\n                title: session.title,\n                session_id: session.session_id,\n                workspace_path: session.workspace_path,\n                workspace_name: session.workspace_name,\n                messages: cloudSync.convertMessages(session.messages),\n            }));\n\n            await cloudSync.syncSessions('cursor', cloudSessions);\n            console.log(`[CloudSync] Synced ${cloudSessions.length} sessions to cloud`);\n\n            // 上报云同步成功事件\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_COMPLETED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                sessions_count: cloudSessions.length,\n            });\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('[CloudSync] Cloud sync failed:', error);\n\n            // 上报云同步失败事件\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            trackEvent(TelemetryEvents.CLOUD_SYNC_FAILED, {\n                source: 'cursor',\n                error_message: errorMessage,\n            });\n            trackError('cloud_sync_error', errorMessage, 'cursor');\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
}

  "contentsAfterEdit": "/**\n * 数据库读取器\n * 负责从 Cursor SQLite 数据库读取对话数据\n */\n\nimport Database from 'better-sqlite3';\nimport { ComposerData, Bubble, DatabaseRow } from '../../types';\n\nexport class CursorDatabaseReader {\n    private db: Database.Database;\n\n    constructor(dbPath: string) {\n        console.log(`[CursorDatabaseReader] Opening database: ${dbPath}`);\n        // 只读模式 + WAL 模式\n        this.db = new Database(dbPath, {\n            readonly: true,\n            fileMustExist: true\n        });\n\n        // 设置 WAL 模式\n        this.db.pragma('journal_mode = WAL');\n        console.log('[CursorDatabaseReader] Database opened successfully');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取所有 Composer\n     */\n    getAllComposers(): ComposerData[] {\n        console.log('[CursorDatabaseReader] Querying all composers...');\n        const stmt = this.db.prepare(`\n            SELECT key, value\n            FROM cursorDiskKV\n            WHERE key LIKE 'composerData:%'\n        `);\n\n        const rows = stmt.all() as DatabaseRow[];\n        console.log(`[CursorDatabaseReader] Found ${rows.length} raw composer rows`);\n        const composers: ComposerData[] = [];\n\n        for (const row of rows) {\n            try {\n                // 值可能是 Buffer 或字符串\n                const valueStr = typeof row.value === 'string'\n                    ? row.value\n                    : row.value.toString('utf-8');\n                const data = JSON.parse(valueStr) as ComposerData;\n                composers.push(data);\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error('[CursorDatabaseReader] Failed to parse composer:', error);\n            }\n        }\n\n        console.log(`[CursorDatabaseReader] Successfully parsed ${composers.length} composers`);\n        return composers;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 获取指定 Composer 的所有 Bubble\n     */\n    getComposerBubbles(composerId: string, bubbleIds: string[]): Bubble[] {\n        const bubbles: Bubble[] = [];\n\n        for (const bubbleId of bubbleIds) {\n            const key = `bubbleId:${composerId}:${bubbleId}`;\n            const stmt = this.db.prepare('SELECT value FROM cursorDiskKV WHERE key = ?');\n            const row = stmt.get(key) as DatabaseRow | undefined;\n\n            if (row && row.value) {\n                try {\n                    // 值可能是 Buffer 或字符串\n                    const valueStr = typeof row.value === 'string'\n                        ? row.value\n                        : row.value.toString('utf-8');\n                    const bubble = JSON.parse(valueStr) as Bubble;\n                    bubbles.push(bubble);\n                } catch (error) {\n                    console.error(`Failed to parse bubble ${bubbleId}:`, error);\n                }\n            }\n        }\n\n        return bubbles;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * 关闭数据库连接\n     */\n    close(): void {\n        this.db.close();\n    }\n}\n\n/**\n * 带重试的数据库打开函数\n */\nexport async function openDatabase(dbPath: string, maxRetries = 3): Promise<CursorDatabaseReader> {\n    for (let i = 0; i < maxRetries; i++) {\n        try {\n            return new CursorDatabaseReader(dbPath);\n        } catch (error) {\n            // 检查是否是 SQLite3 兼容性问题\n            const errorMessage = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);\n            if (errorMessage.includes('NODE_MODULE_VERSION') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('better_sqlite3.node') ||\n                errorMessage.includes('compiled against a different Node.js version')) {\n\n                // 如果是第一次遇到这个问题，尝试重新加载 SQLite3\n                if (i === 0) {\n                    console.log('Detected SQLite3 compatibility issue, attempting to reload...');\n                    // 这里我们不直接处理，让调用方处理\n                    throw new Error('SQLITE_COMPATIBILITY_ERROR: ' + errorMessage);\n                }\n            }\n\n            if (i < maxRetries - 1) {\n                // 等待 500ms 后重试\n                await sleep(500);\n                continue;\n            }\n            throw error;\n        }\n    }\n    throw new Error('Failed to open database after retries');\n}\n\nfunction sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {\n    return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));\n}\n"
}

  "new_string": "    /**\n     * 保存对话到文件\n     */\n    async save(composer: ComposerData, markdown: string): Promise<string> {\n        console.log(`[HistorySaver] ========== Starting save ==========`);\n        console.log(`[HistorySaver] History dir: ${this.historyDir}`);\n        console.log(`[HistorySaver] Source: ${this.source}`);\n        console.log(`[HistorySaver] Composer ID: ${composer.composerId}`);\n        console.log(`[HistorySaver] Composer name: ${composer.name || 'untitled'}`);\n        \n        // 确保目录存在\n        try {\n            await fs.mkdir(this.historyDir, { recursive: true });\n            console.log(`[HistorySaver] Directory ensured: ${this.historyDir}`);\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error(`[HistorySaver] Failed to create directory: ${error}`);\n            throw error;\n        }\n\n        // 生成文件名\n        const filename = this.generateFilename(composer);\n        const filepath = path.join(this.historyDir, filename);\n        console.log(`[HistorySaver] Target filepath: ${filepath}`);\n\n        // 检查是否需要更新\n        const shouldSave = await this.shouldSave(filepath, markdown);\n        console.log(`[HistorySaver] Should save: ${shouldSave}`);\n\n        if (shouldSave) {\n            try {\n                await fs.writeFile(filepath, markdown, 'utf-8');\n                console.log(`[HistorySaver] ✓ Saved successfully: ${filepath}`);\n                \n                // 上报文件保存事件（仅登录用户）\n                trackEventIfLoggedIn(TelemetryEvents.FILE_SAVED_LOCALLY, {\n                    source: this.source,\n                    session_id: composer.composerId,\n                });\n            } catch (error) {\n                console.error(`[HistorySaver] ✗ Failed to save file: ${error}`);\n                throw error;\n            }\n        } else {\n            console.log(`[HistorySaver] ⊘ Skipped (unchanged): ${filepath}`);\n        }\n\n        return filepath;\n    }"
}

  "contents": "import { ComposerData, Bubble } from '../../types';\nimport { CursorDatabaseReader } from './cursor-database-reader';\n\n/**\n * WorkspaceFilter filters composers so we only export chats\n * that belong to the currently open workspace.\n */\nexport class WorkspaceFilter {\n    private currentWorkspacePath: string;\n\n    constructor(workspacePath: string) {\n        this.currentWorkspacePath = this.normalizePath(workspacePath || '');\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Returns true if the composer belongs to the current workspace.\n     */\n    belongsToCurrentWorkspace(\n        composer: ComposerData,\n        reader: CursorDatabaseReader\n    ): boolean {\n        const composerName = composer.name || composer.composerId;\n        \n        if (!this.currentWorkspacePath) {\n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] ✗ ${composerName}: No current workspace path`);\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        const headers = composer.fullConversationHeadersOnly || [];\n        if (headers.length === 0) {\n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] ✗ ${composerName}: No headers`);\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        const firstBubbleId = headers[0].bubbleId;\n        const bubbles = reader.getComposerBubbles(composer.composerId, [firstBubbleId]);\n        if (bubbles.length === 0) {\n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] ✗ ${composerName}: No bubbles found`);\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        const bubble = bubbles[0] as Bubble & { workspaceProjectDir?: string };\n\n        // Prefer workspaceUris when available\n        if (bubble.workspaceUris && bubble.workspaceUris.length > 0) {\n            const bubbleWorkspace = this.uriToPath(bubble.workspaceUris[0]);\n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] ${composerName}: workspaceUri=\"${bubbleWorkspace}\", current=\"${this.currentWorkspacePath}\"`);\n            if (bubbleWorkspace && this.pathsMatch(bubbleWorkspace, this.currentWorkspacePath)) {\n                return true;\n            }\n        }\n\n        // Fallback to workspaceProjectDir\n        if ((bubble as any).workspaceProjectDir) {\n            const bubbleWorkspace = this.normalizePath((bubble as any).workspaceProjectDir);\n            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] ${composerName}: workspaceProjectDir=\"${bubbleWorkspace}\", current=\"${this.currentWorkspacePath}\"`);\n            if (bubbleWorkspace && this.pathsMatch(bubbleWorkspace, this.currentWorkspacePath)) {\n                return true;\n            }\n        }\n\n        console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] ✗ ${composerName}: No workspace info in bubble`);\n        return false;\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Convert a file:// URI to a filesystem path.\n     */\n    private uriToPath(uri: string): string {\n        try {\n            const decoded = decodeURIComponent(uri);\n            let fsPath = decoded;\n            \n            // Remove file:// prefix\n            if (fsPath.startsWith('file://')) {\n                fsPath = fsPath.substring(7); // Remove 'file://'\n            }\n            \n            // On Windows, file:///C:/path -> /C:/path, we need to remove the leading /\n            // On macOS/Linux, file:///Users/... -> /Users/..., keep the leading /\n            if (process.platform === 'win32') {\n                // Remove leading / before drive letter (e.g., /C: -> C:)\n                fsPath = fsPath.replace(/^\\/([A-Za-z]:)/, '$1');\n                fsPath = fsPath.replace(/%3A/gi, ':');\n            }\n\n            return this.normalizePath(fsPath);\n        } catch {\n            return '';\n        }\n    }\n\n    /**\n     * Normalize paths for reliable comparison (cross-platform compatible).\n     * - Convert backslashes to forward slashes\n     * - Convert to lowercase (for case-insensitive comparison across platforms)\n     * - Remove trailing slash\n     */\n    private normalizePath(filepath: string): string {\n        if (!filepath) return '';\n\n        // 统一使用正斜杠\n        let normalized = filepath.replace(/\\\\/g, '/');\n\n        // 始终转换为小写（跨平台兼容：Windows 数据在 Linux 上也能正确比较）\n        normalized = normalized.toLowerCase();\n\n        // 移除末尾斜杠\n        normalized = normalized.replace(/\\/$/, '');\n\n        return normalized;\n    }\n\n    private pathsMatch(path1: string, path2: string): boolean {\n        return this.normalizePath(path1) === this.normalizePath(path2);\n    }\n}\n",

## 🤖 Assistant #41 (Agent)

_2025-12-30 11:59Z_

代码已经编译成功。我已经在关键位置添加了详细的调试信息。

## 如何调试

请按以下步骤操作：

### 步骤 1：打开开发者控制台
在 Cursor 中按 `Cmd + Shift + P`，然后输入 `Toggle Developer Tools` 并选择执行。

### 步骤 2：重新加载扩展
按 `Cmd + Shift + P`，输入 `Reload Window` 并执行。

### 步骤 3：执行手动保存
按 `Cmd + Shift + P`，输入 `Save chat history now` 并执行。

### 步骤 4：查看控制台输出

在开发者工具的 **Console** 标签页中，你应该会看到类似这样的调试输出：

```
[Init] ========== Checking Cursor database ==========
[Init] Cursor database path: /Users/xxx/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb
[Init] Database exists: true
[Init] Cursor watcher started successfully

[SaveNow] ========== Manual save triggered ==========
[SaveNow] Number of watchers: 1
[SaveNow] Workspace root: /Users/xxx/your-project

[Cursor:syncNow] ========== Starting sync ==========
[Cursor:performLocalSync] ========== Starting local sync ==========
[CursorDatabaseReader] Found 5 raw composer rows
[Cursor:performLocalSync] Total composers: 5
[Cursor:performLocalSync] Skipped (not in workspace): 4
[Cursor:performLocalSync] Processed and saved: 1
```

### 常见问题和对应日志

| 问题 | 对应日志关键词 |
|------|---------------|
| 数据库未找到 | `Database exists: false` |
| 没有 watcher | `Number of watchers: 0` |
| SQLite 加载失败 | `Failed to create database reader` |
| 没有 composer 数据 | `Found 0 raw composer rows` |
| 所有对话被过滤 | `Skipped (not in workspace): N` 且 `Processed and saved: 0` |
| 目录创建失败 | `Failed to create directory` |

---

**请执行上述步骤，然后把 Console 中的输出复制过来**，我可以根据日志帮你定位具体问题。

>
> 根据我之前看到的代码，WorkspaceFilter 会检查每个对话是否属于当前工作区。如果 bubble 中的 workspaceUris 或 workspaceProjectDir 与当前工作区路径不匹配，对话会被跳过。
>
> 可能的原因：
> 1. 在另一个项目中，Cursor 数据库中没有与该工作区关联的对话
> 2. 对话的 workspaceUris/workspaceProjectDir 信息可能不正确或缺失
> 3. 路径比较时大小写问题（虽然代码中已经做了 toLowerCase 处理）
> 4. 对话可能是在不同的工作区创建的
>
> 让我分析一下代码逻辑，解释给用户听。

</details>

## 🤖 Assistant #44 (Agent)

_2025-12-30 12:00Z_

根据代码分析，这是 **WorkspaceFilter 工作区过滤** 导致的。让我解释一下原因：

## 问题分析

插件的设计是 **只保存属于当前工作区的对话**。这是通过以下逻辑实现的：

```45:63:src/agents/cursor/cursor-workspace-filter.ts
        // Prefer workspaceUris when available
        if (bubble.workspaceUris && bubble.workspaceUris.length > 0) {
            const bubbleWorkspace = this.uriToPath(bubble.workspaceUris[0]);
            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] ${composerName}: workspaceUri="${bubbleWorkspace}", current="${this.currentWorkspacePath}"`);
            if (bubbleWorkspace && this.pathsMatch(bubbleWorkspace, this.currentWorkspacePath)) {
                return true;
            }
        }

        // Fallback to workspaceProjectDir
        if ((bubble as any).workspaceProjectDir) {
            const bubbleWorkspace = this.normalizePath((bubble as any).workspaceProjectDir);
            console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] ${composerName}: workspaceProjectDir="${bubbleWorkspace}", current="${this.currentWorkspacePath}"`);
            if (bubbleWorkspace && this.pathsMatch(bubbleWorkspace, this.currentWorkspacePath)) {
                return true;
            }
        }

        console.log(`[WorkspaceFilter] ✗ ${composerName}: No workspace info in bubble`);
```

## 可能的原因

| 原因 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| **1. 对话是在其他项目创建的** | 如果你在项目 A 中创建了对话，然后切换到项目 B，这个对话不会保存在项目 B |
| **2. 对话没有工作区信息** | 某些 Cursor 版本或某些对话类型可能没有记录 `workspaceUris` |
| **3. 路径不完全匹配** | 如果你通过符号链接或不同方式打开同一项目，路径可能不同 |
| **4. 在该项目中从未使用过 Cursor 聊天** | 如果你在另一个项目中从未使用过 Cursor 的 AI 功能，自然没有聊天记录 |

## 验证方法

请在 **另一个没有保存记录的项目** 中执行以下步骤：

1. 打开开发者控制台 (`Cmd + Shift + P` → `Toggle Developer Tools`)
2. 执行 `Save chat history now`
3. 查看控制台输出，找以下关键信息：

```
[Cursor:performLocalSync] Total composers: X
[Cursor:performLocalSync] Skipped (not in workspace): Y
[Cursor:performLocalSync] Processed and saved: Z
```

以及 WorkspaceFilter 的具体匹配日志：
```
[WorkspaceFilter] xxx: workspaceUri="/path/a", current="/path/b"
```

## 如果确认是这个原因

如果你想在所有工作区保存所有对话（不做过滤），我可以帮你添加一个配置选项来禁用工作区过滤。

---

**请先在另一个项目中运行 `Save chat history now` 并复制控制台日志给我**，这样我能准确判断问题所在。

---

## 🤖 Assistant #47 (Agent)

_2025-12-30 12:04Z_

这些日志主要是 **Cursor 本身的内部错误**，与我们的插件无关。我没有看到插件的调试日志。

请按以下步骤重新操作：

## 步骤 1：确保在另一个项目中打开 Cursor

先打开你说的"另一个没有保存聊天记录的项目"。

## 步骤 2：打开开发者控制台

`Cmd + Shift + P` → 输入 `Toggle Developer Tools` → 回车

## 步骤 3：清空控制台

在开发者工具的 Console 标签页，点击 🚫 按钮（或右键选择 "Clear console"）清空现有日志。

## 步骤 4：过滤日志

在控制台顶部的过滤框中输入：
```
[Cursor: OR [SaveNow OR [Init OR [HistorySaver OR [WorkspaceFilter
```

或者更简单地输入：`llm` 或 `Cursor:`

## 步骤 5：执行保存命令

`Cmd + Shift + P` → 输入 `Save chat history now` → 回车

## 步骤 6：复制相关日志

现在应该只看到我们插件的日志，类似：

```
[SaveNow] ========== Manual save triggered ==========
[SaveNow] Number of watchers: 1
[Cursor:syncNow] ========== Starting sync ==========
[Cursor:performLocalSync] Total composers: 5
[Cursor:performLocalSync] Skipped (not in workspace): 5
[Cursor:performLocalSync] Processed and saved: 0
```

---

**如果完全看不到这些日志**，说明插件可能没有正确加载。请检查：

1. 在 Extensions 面板中搜索 "LLM Chat History"，确认插件已启用
2. 或者执行 `Cmd + Shift + P` → `Developer: Show Running Extensions`，看看插件是否在运行

---

请再试一次，把过滤后的插件相关日志发给我。
